title: Config
description: Sets session-level defaults for the call. Configures default TTS, STT, VAD, recording, streaming, and other session-wide settings. These defaults apply to all subsequent verbs unless overridden at the verb level. Typically the first verb in an application. Can be used multiple times during a call to change settings.

id.description: An optional unique identifier for this verb instance.

synthesizer.description: Default TTS configuration for the session.

recognizer.description: Default STT configuration for the session.

bargeIn.description: Default barge-in configuration. When enabled, callers can interrupt playing prompts with speech or DTMF.

sticky.description: If true, barge-in settings persist across verbs rather than resetting after each verb.

ttsStream.description: Default TTS streaming configuration for the session.

listen.description: Nested listen verb — session-level audio streaming configuration.

stream.description: Nested stream verb — session-level audio streaming configuration. Alias for 'listen'.

transcribe.description: Nested transcribe verb — session-level real-time transcription configuration.

fillerNoise.description: Default filler noise configuration for the session.

vad.description: Default voice activity detection configuration for the session.

notifyEvents.description: If true, send call events (e.g. DTMF, call status changes) to the application via the status webhook.

notifySttLatency.description: If true, include STT latency measurements in webhook payloads.

reset.description: Reset specific session-level settings to their defaults. Pass a setting name or array of setting names to reset.

onHoldMusic.description: URL of an audio file to play when the call is placed on hold.

actionHookDelayAction.description: Default configuration for handling slow webhook responses.

sipRequestWithinDialogHook.description: A webhook to invoke when a SIP request (e.g. INFO, NOTIFY) is received within the dialog.

boostAudioSignal.description: Boost (or attenuate) the audio signal in dB for the session.

referHook.description: A webhook to invoke when a SIP REFER request is received.

earlyMedia.description: If true, allow early media (audio before call answer) for the session.

autoStreamTts.description: If true, automatically use streaming TTS for all 'say' verbs in the session.

disableTtsCache.description: If true, disable TTS caching for the session.

trackTtsPlayout.description: If true, report the actual text spoken via TTS. Requires a TTS vendor that supports alignment data (e.g. ElevenLabs). On each utterance completion or interruption, a tts_spoken event is sent to the '/streaming-event' endpoint with fields: 'text' (string — the text actually spoken) and 'bargein' (boolean — true if the user interrupted before TTS finished). See the tts-streaming-event callback schema for full details.

noiseIsolation.description: Noise isolation configuration to reduce background noise on call audio. Defaults to filtering inbound (caller) audio; can also filter outbound audio via the direction option.

turnTaking.description: Turn-taking detection configuration for conversational AI applications.
